overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a black sports car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle navigates neon-lit urban streets, maneuvers through a dirt lot, passes through an industrial corridor with metal walls, and emerges onto a multi-lane bridge with the futuristic city skyline visible in the background.

events.description: car turns off paved road and enters dirt lot area

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-slicked city streets with neon signage, turning right toward an industrial area

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving in the opposite direction on the left side of the road

entered.detail: tall building covered in glowing holographic advertisements and neon signage
large concrete overpass structure spanning across the street ahead

multi-story buildings with illuminated windows and storefronts

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban street at night, with holographic advertisements glowing on distant towers. The car drives forward beneath an elevated highway overpass, navigating through the neon-lit environment before turning right into a dirt lot area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt lot with temporary market structures

events.description: car performs a U-turn maneuver in the dirt lot, rotating 180 degrees

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the vehicle in a dirt lot, executing a U-turn near wooden market stalls

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and gravel ground with tire tracks and puddles
wooden structure with roof serving as a temporary market stall or shelter
white concrete blocks marking the boundary of the lot

segments.scene_description: The car enters an open dirt lot surrounded by low industrial buildings and temporary wooden structures. After driving toward the back of the lot, the vehicle executes a U-turn, kicking up dust as it rotates to face the exit, with the glowing city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with metal walls and overhead lighting

events.description: exits dirt lot and enters narrow industrial corridor with corrugated metal walls

agents.ego_description: driving through a narrow industrial passage flanked by corrugated metal walls and chain-link fencing

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk next to the metal wall

entered.detail: tall industrial wall made of corrugated metal sheets with graffiti
metal chain-link fencing running along the left side of the road
rows of bright industrial lamps suspended over the road

segments.scene_description: Leaving the dirt lot, the car enters a narrow industrial corridor defined by corrugated metal walls and chain-link fencing. Overhead industrial lamps cast harsh lighting on the asphalt as the vehicle drives forward through the confined passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane bridge with city skyline view

events.description: emerges from industrial corridor onto open bridge with city skyline ahead

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto a multi-lane bridge with the illuminated city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights on driving in the opposite lane

entered.detail: concrete and metal safety railing along the edge of the bridge
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
elevated highway or monorail track running parallel to the bridge

segments.scene_description: The car emerges from the industrial corridor onto a wide multi-lane bridge, revealing an expansive view of the futuristic city skyline. Street lamps line both sides of the bridge as the vehicle drives forward, passing a pedestrian on the sidewalk and approaching oncoming traffic in the opposite lanes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a black sports car transitions from the neon-lit urban core through a gritty industrial zone and onto an expansive city bridge. It begins on a wet street beneath an elevated highway overpass, gliding past glowing holographic advertisements before turning right into an open dirt lot. As the vehicle executes a U-turn amidst low industrial buildings and wooden structures, the scene shifts from the dusty lot into a narrow corridor defined by corrugated metal walls and harsh overhead lamps. The camera then follows the car as it emerges from this confined passage onto a wide multi-lane bridge, where the environment opens up to reveal a panoramic view of the futuristic skyline. Finally, the vehicle drives forward past street lamps and a lone pedestrian, heading toward oncoming traffic under the vast city lights.
